creator: bacon@smithers.neuro.mcw.edu
text:
In the Xorg 7.2 port, libGLw.so.1 no longer contains 
	glwDrawingAreaWidgetClass.  It does contain glwMDrawingAreaWidgetClass 
	(the Motif-specific alternative), but there are programs around that 
	won't build with the latter.  I checked the Xorg source code, and 
	glwDrawingAreaWidgetClass is still present, but it's disabled in
	the default build.  Xorg 6.x on FreeBSD contains both
	glwDrawingAreaWidgetClass and glwMDrawingAreaWidgetClass.  If possible,
	it would be nice to have them both available in Xorg 7.x.
